title: deschampsia cespitosa subsp. cespitosa
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. cespitosa, also known as Tufted Hair Grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. cespitosa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and treating gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
